## Architecture Review Checklist

- [ ] Security risks identified and documented
- [ ] Data classification and PII handling documented
- [ ] Latency and performance implications reviewed
- [ ] Compliance and audit requirements reviewed
- [ ] Observability metrics/signals defined
- [ ] Rollback and incident response approach defined

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `python3 tools/validate_docs.py`
- [ ] Links and anchors verified
- [ ] Mermaid files pass structural checks
